description: GardenWorld wants to update its Purchase Order numbering scheme for the new fiscal year 2025. Configure the system to use a new sequence for Purchase Orders by creating a sequence named 'Purchase Order 2025' with a Start No of 1000, Current Next of 1000, Prefix 'PO25-', and Increment of 1. Assign this new sequence to the existing 'Purchase Order' Document Type for the GardenWorld client to ensure future Purchase Orders use the new numbering format.
